data.title: Hick's Law Implementation
data.description: Keeps homepage simplistic to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design with a clean search bar interface.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes clickable areas on webpages for easy user accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Ensures button sizes are large enough and spaced appropriately.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes design appeal to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistently clear and intuitive design across all web pages.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items closer together for improved user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes spacing and layout to guide user’s natural flow.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns design with user expectations set by other major websites.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates familiar UI elements for seamless user experience.
